title: atragene sibirica var. iliensis
intro: Atragene sibirica var. iliensis, also known as Siberian coltsfoot, is a perennial plant species native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis, coughs, and asthma, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Atragene sibirica var. iliensis include reducing inflammation, soothing coughs, and alleviating respiratory problems, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and has been used in various herbal remedies for centuries to promote overall well-being and health.
